---
title: "UNIT 2 - WHONET SaTScan Analysis: Configuration, Analysis, and Interpretation"
---

![](images/Digital%20Epidemiology%20Workshop%20Module_2026_page-0010.jpg)

![](images/Digital%20Epidemiology%20Workshop%20Module_2026_page-0011.jpg)

![](images/Digital%20Epidemiology%20Workshop%20Module_2026_page-0012.jpg)

![](images/Digital%20Epidemiology%20Workshop%20Module_2026_page-0013.jpg)

![](images/Digital%20Epidemiology%20Workshop%20Module_2026_page-0014.jpg)

![](images/Digital%20Epidemiology%20Workshop%20Module_2026_page-0015.jpg)

![](images/Digital%20Epidemiology%20Workshop%20Module_2026_page-0016.jpg)

![](images/Digital%20Epidemiology%20Workshop%20Module_2026_page-0017.jpg)

![](images/Digital%20Epidemiology%20Workshop%20Module_2026_page-0018.jpg)

![](images/Digital%20Epidemiology%20Workshop%20Module_2026_page-0019.jpg)

![](images/Digital%20Epidemiology%20Workshop%20Module_2026_page-0020.jpg)

![](images/Digital%20Epidemiology%20Workshop%20Module_2026_page-0021.jpg)

![](images/Digital%20Epidemiology%20Workshop%20Module_2026_page-0022.jpg)

![](images/Digital%20Epidemiology%20Workshop%20Module_2026_page-0023.jpg)

![](images/Digital%20Epidemiology%20Workshop%20Module_2026_page-0024.jpg)

![](images/Digital%20Epidemiology%20Workshop%20Module_2026_page-0025.jpg)

![](images/Digital%20Epidemiology%20Workshop%20Module_2026_page-0026.jpg)

![](images/Digital%20Epidemiology%20Workshop%20Module_2026_page-0027.jpg)

![](images/Digital%20Epidemiology%20Workshop%20Module_2026_page-0028-01.jpg)

![](images/Digital%20Epidemiology%20Workshop%20Module_2026_page-0029.jpg)

![](images/Digital%20Epidemiology%20Workshop%20Module_2026_page-0030.jpg)
